overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza with large billboards, ascending a wide staircase to a busy intersection with flying cars and towering glass skyscrapers, then proceeding along a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive wooden beam architecture.

events.description: pedestrian in colorful outfit appears descending the stairs ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza past large All Foods billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: character in purple and teal athletic wear descending the white stairs towards the camera

entered.detail: large wall with multiple billboards featuring the All Foods mascot
wide white staircase leading up between buildings
tall futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade
gray concrete wall with white graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with large advertising billboards on the left wall. The camera moves forward on concrete pavement toward a wide white staircase, passing planters with trees. A character in colorful athletic wear descends the stairs toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide outdoor staircase between commercial buildings

events.description: begins ascending the white marble stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase between planter boxes

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide white staircase flanked by concrete planters with trees. The billboards fall behind as the view opens up toward the street level above, with the glass skyscraper growing larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy futuristic intersection with elevated highways

events.description: exits stairway into open intersection with multi-lane traffic
futuristic cars pass through the intersection on colorful road markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the colorful crosswalk and turning right along the busy street

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection
person wearing red cap walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic elevated roadway with holographic billboards displaying purple advertisements
palm trees lining the street median
brightly colored pedestrian crossing with yellow and blue stripes

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a bright sunlit intersection, the camera reveals a bustling futuristic street with flying cars, palm trees, and towering glass buildings. The camera crosses the colorful striped crosswalk, passing pedestrians and vehicles, with an elevated highway visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with wooden beam ceiling

events.description: enters covered walkway under building overpass with wooden beam ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded pedestrian path under the building structure

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the covered walkway

entered.detail: architectural wooden beams forming a rhythmic covered ceiling with light filtering through
red illuminated vending machine against the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a long covered walkway with distinctive wooden beam architecture overhead, creating dramatic light and shadow patterns. The path runs alongside a road with passing cars, while pedestrians walk ahead in the shaded corridor. A red vending machine glows against the concrete wall on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban plaza, ascending toward a bustling futuristic intersection before entering a shaded architectural corridor. It begins on concrete pavement passing large advertising billboards and planters, moving forward as a character in colorful athletic wear descends a wide white staircase. As the camera climbs these stairs, the billboards recede and the view opens up toward a towering glass skyscraper that dominates the frame. The scene then expands into a bright intersection filled with flying cars, palm trees, and an elevated highway, crossing a colorful striped crosswalk amidst a flow of pedestrians and vehicles. Finally, the camera transitions from the open sunlight into a long covered walkway, where distinctive wooden beams create dramatic shadows over a path featuring a glowing red vending machine.
